# Mongolian Recipe App - Workspace Instructions

## Project Overview
Flutter mobile app for Mongolian cooking recipes with premium subscription model.

## Development Progress

- [x] Create .github/copilot-instructions.md
- [x] Get Flutter project setup info
- [x] Scaffold Flutter project
- [x] Configure pubspec.yaml
- [x] Create project structure
- [x] Install dependencies
- [x] Verify project compilation

## ✅ Project Setup Complete!

Your Flutter workspace is ready. The project includes:
- ✅ Flutter project scaffolded (iOS & Android)
- ✅ 21+ packages installed (Appwrite, Provider, go_router, video_player, etc.)
- ✅ Project structure created (screens, widgets, models, services, providers, utils)
- ✅ Basic home screen implemented
- ✅ iOS 26-inspired theme setup
- ✅ No compilation errors

## Tech Stack
- Flutter/Dart (iOS & Android)
- Appwrite (Backend)
- State Management: Provider
- Navigation: go_router
- Design: iOS 26-inspired UI

## Key Features
- Recipe browsing with categories
- Premium subscription (one-time payment: 1M/3M/6M)
- Offline mode with favorites
- User authentication (email/phone)
- Star rating system
- Customer service chat
- Mongolian language only

## Next Steps
1. Configure Appwrite backend (endpoint, project ID, database)
2. Design UI screens in detail
3. Implement authentication flow
4. Build recipe browsing functionality
5. Create payment flow with transaction codes

## Run the App
```bash
flutter run
```
